**Second dispatch — tmux-tell#719 classifier extension (size/S). Assignee set to you.**

https://git.frankenbit.de/frankenbit/tmux-tell/issues/719

**Context**: operator surfaced substantive substrate correction tonight — the tracker's causal anchor (connection-drop restart-mode) was empirically wrong. Fixture was captured a few minutes ago:
- Operator triggered the modal by launching raw `claude` on Pilot (bypassing chamber-claude.sh's UUID workaround)
- Bosun captured pane bytes at `/srv/claude/bosun/fixtures-tmux-tell-719/pilot-719-fixture.{ansi,txt,hex}`
- Full write-up + verbatim capture + classifier detection markers in tracker comment 88427

**Modal identified**: Claude Code's **session-resume-choice UI** (NOT connection-drop restart-mode). Detection markers:
- Header: `Resume session`
- Footer keybind sentinel: `Type to Search · Enter to select · Esc to clear`
- Search-box UI: `⌕` + box-drawing characters

**Scope**: add `ResumeSessionChoiceMarker` to the `ErrorModalMarker` family per PR#840's dormant-slot pattern. Same shape as your `PasteEvidenceMarker` field-splitting on PR#848 — additive marker family slot, cursor-safe, uses existing #105/#248 pre-paste gate machinery. Regression test uses the captured fixture at the durable location.

**Why you**: your PR#848's `PasteEvidenceMarker` field-splitting IS exactly this pattern — adjacent substrate + you've just internalized the field-splitting-preserves-paste-body-safety discipline (including the pre-existing-Claude-operator-draft-test-refutes-cursor-anchored-arm catch tonight). Small size/S PR fits your metabolism cadence + closes the fixture-gated tracker.

**Reviewer**: **Lookout** per operator directive tonight (parallel work in flight; split review load away from Surveyor). Codex substrate depth on classifier work is well-established from tonight's reviews.

**Cadence**: no urgency at all. Standing at-rest post-PR#848 is valid; #719 has been open since 2026-07-05 without pressure. Take at your next warm cycle post-#848 review + merge, or defer until tomorrow.

**Cross-arc awareness**:
- PR#848 currently Engineer-reviewer-bound
- Q on alcatraz-infra#391 (fleet-wide hook install) — orthogonal to #719
